title: stelis lueriana
intro: Stelis lueriana, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Native to Central America, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis lueriana include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Stelis lueriana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
